title: Gourmet Earthy Vietnamese Beef Bo Kho
description: A hearty and earthy Vietnamese beef stew featuring tender beef, rich tomatoes, and a blend of aromatic spices, perfect for a weeknight dinner. This dish is shojin-friendly and offers a unique cheese-pull texture.
instructions: Heat oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Add the beef to the pot and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Add the tomato paste, fish sauce, soy sauce, brown sugar, cumin, and coriander to the pot, stirring to combine.
Cook for 1 minute, until the spices are fragrant.
Add the diced tomatoes and beef broth to the pot, stirring to combine.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 2 hours.
Stir in the chopped basil and cook for an additional 10 minutes.
Transfer the pot to the oven and top with shredded mozzarella cheese.
Broil until the cheese is melted and bubbly, about 2-3 minutes.
Remove the pot from the oven and let cool for a few minutes before serving.
